daily_brief.headline: Universe Pulse reads Active (composite 0.13).
paragraphs: Across the 30-holding launch universe, the average Pulse is 0.130 (Active).
Live macro layer covers 12/18 of the daily-pull factors (F5, F6_16, F13 leading).

signals.label: Headline CPI
signals.impact: Direct read on consumer prices; affects rate expectations.

daily_brief.disclaimer: The Daily Brief is editorial context, not a forecast or recommendation.

factors.name: Return — 1 day
factors.plain_language: How the holding moved in today's session, vs. yesterday's close.

factors.name: Return vs. sector
factors.plain_language: How it moved today against the average peer in its sector.

factors.name: Volatility (30d)
factors.plain_language: How big its day-to-day swings have been over the last 30 trading days.

factors.name: Drawdown depth
factors.plain_language: How far it has fallen from its recent peak, as a % of that peak.

factors.name: BoC overnight rate
factors.plain_language: The Bank of Canada's policy rate and the direction it is moving.

factors.name: FX (CAD/USD, exposure-scaled)
factors.plain_language: The move in CAD/USD weighted by the holding's USD revenue exposure.

factors.name: Commodity pressure
factors.plain_language: How the relevant commodity bucket (energy / metals / grains) has moved, 30d.

factors.name: Sector rotation
factors.plain_language: How the holding's sector has performed vs. the broader market, 30d.

factors.name: Inflation — Headline CPI
factors.plain_language: How fast Canadian consumer prices are rising, all-items, YoY.

factors.name: Gas prices (CAD/L, national avg)
factors.plain_language: What Canadian drivers pay at the pump, monthly.

factors.name: Gold price (USD/oz)
factors.plain_language: The price of gold. A risk-off hedge — moves up when equities move down.

factors.name: Oil supply — embargoed %
factors.plain_language: What share of global oil supply is held by sanctioned producers.

factors.name: Renewable energy supply (Canada)
factors.plain_language: Total Canadian renewable electricity generation, monthly.

factors.name: Auto sector sales (Canada)
factors.plain_language: Total Canadian new motor-vehicle sales, monthly.

factors.name: GDP per capita (Canada)
factors.plain_language: Canadian GDP divided by population, quarterly.

factors.name: US Fed funds rate (target upper)
factors.plain_language: The US Fed's policy rate ceiling.

factors.name: 10y − 2y Treasury spread
factors.plain_language: The difference between US 10-year and 2-year yields. Inverted (negative) for >1 quarter historically precedes recessions.

factors.name: Labour Heat (unemployment rate)
factors.plain_language: What share of the Canadian labour force is unemployed, monthly.

factors.name: Shelter Cost Pressure (NHPI)
factors.plain_language: How fast Canadian housing prices are rising, month-over-month.

factors.name: Trade Balance Pulse
factors.plain_language: Whether Canada is exporting more than it imports, monthly.

factors.name: Inflation Expectations (10y Breakeven)
factors.plain_language: What bond markets think inflation will average over the next 10 years.

factors.name: Credit Spread (HY OAS)
factors.plain_language: The extra yield junk-rated US borrowers pay over US Treasuries.

factors.name: Market Fear (VIX)
factors.plain_language: What the options market is pricing for S&P 500 volatility over the next 30 days.

factors.name: News tone shift
factors.plain_language: Whether the tone of recent stories has shifted positive or negative, 7d window.

factors.name: Event volume
factors.plain_language: How many distinct news events mention the holding, normalised to its baseline.

factors.name: Story direction
factors.plain_language: Whether the dominant narrative has shifted (favourable ↔ unfavourable).

factors.name: News-vs-macro alignment
factors.plain_language: Whether the news and macro signals are pointing the same way.

factors.name: News spike detection
factors.plain_language: Whether today's 24h news-event volume for a holding has spiked above its trailing 30d baseline.

factors.name: Prediction-market sentiment (expanded)
factors.plain_language: Crowd probabilities from Polymarket, Kalshi, PredictIt on macro questions.
